name: Hiron-Trade Investments & Industrial Buildings Ltd
summary: Hiron-Trade Investments & Industrial Buildings Ltd engages in the real estate rental activities in Israel. The company acquires plots and assets, as well as constructs commercial centers; and constructs and leases refrigerated houses, bonded warehouses, archives, logistic warehouses, light industry facilities, offices, and commercial sales centers. It also imports and markets trees and wooden products, including plywood for the furniture industry, as well as M.D.F, white and pine, beech, rough, and hard tree wood. The company was founded in 1974 and is based in Tel Aviv, Israel.
